subject: Chi-Yu, a small round fish-like Pokémon with a green body and large prominent eyes, surrounded by intense flames
description: Chi-Yu floats amid a roiling mass of orange and red fire against a rocky landscape backdrop. The creature has a compact round body, vivid large eyes, and small fins, rendered in warm greens against the surrounding blaze. Rocky ground elements are partially visible beneath the flames. The composition centers the Pokémon within the fire as if it is the source of the conflagration rather than its victim. The mood is intense and elemental.
foreground: Chi-Yu floating amid orange and red flames with rocky terrain below
background: More fire and rocky landscape, warm orange gradient
